languages.text: "Еще немного, Лорд-капитан. Прошу простить за неподобающее обращение, но нам нужна еще минута".

traits.locale_text: "Пациент в стабильно-тяжелом состоянии, Лорд-капитан. Время еще есть".

languages.text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."
languages.original_text: "Еще немного, Лорд-капитан. Прошу простить за неподобающее обращение, но нам нужна еще минута".

traits.locale_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we require another minute."
"We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."
"Of course, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we require another minute."
"We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we require another minute."
"We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

languages.text: 「もちろん、艦長様。不適切なお願いで申し訳ありませんが、もう1分必要です」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we require another minute."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、艦長様。不適切なお願いで申し訳ありませんが、もう1分必要です。」

languages.text: « Nous en avons presque terminé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » Je m'excuse pour cette demande inconvenante, mais il ne nous faut guère plus d'une minute supplémentaire. »
languages.original_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

traits.locale_text: « Nous en avons presque terminé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » Je m'excuse pour cette demande inconvenante, mais il ne nous faut guère plus d'une minute supplémentaire. »

languages.text: "Bitiyor Lord Kaptan. Bu uygunsuz istek için özür dilerim ama bir dakikaya daha ihtiyacımız var."
languages.original_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

traits.locale_text: "Bitiyor Lord Kaptan. Bu uygunsuz istek için özür dilerim ama bir dakikaya daha ihtiyacımız var."

languages.text: "Wir sind fast fertig, Lord Captain. Bitte entschuldigt die unangemessene Anfrage, aber wir brauchen noch eine Minute."
languages.original_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sind fast fertig, Lord Captain. Bitte entschuldigt die unangemessene Anfrage, aber wir brauchen noch eine Minute."

languages.text: «Casi hemos terminado, Lord Capitán. Mis disculpas por esta solicitud tan inapropiada, pero necesitamos un minuto más».
languages.original_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

traits.locale_text: «Casi hemos terminado, Lord Capitán. Mis disculpas por esta solicitud tan inapropiada, pero necesitamos un minuto más».

languages.text: “马上就完成，舰长大人。很抱歉让您久候，不过还请再给我们一分钟。”
languages.original_text: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."

traits.locale_text: “马上就完成，舰长大人。很抱歉让您久候，不过还请再给我们一分钟。”
